files.notes: Local wrapper filename references were updated after replacing dash-prefixed CMD entrypoints with underscore-prefixed entrypoints.

Wrapper path and console formatting adapted after rehome so the published helper entrypoint invokes the co-located PowerShell script with framed colored retry output, clears the console before reruns, and resolves Windows PowerShell from the trusted absolute SystemRoot path instead of PATH.

Usage text was updated after rehoming the sanitizer helper so it no longer points at the original scripts/ path. Toolkit-adapted to strip live error workflow links and MCP exposure settings from reusable template output.

Local wrapper filename references, co-located stripper script resolution, safe repo-root staging folder resolution that refuses filesystem roots, colored section/status output, and clean failure reporting were updated after replacing dash-prefixed CMD entrypoints with underscore-prefixed entrypoints and rehoming the helper from the original scripts folder.

Wrapper path and console formatting adapted after rehome so the published helper entrypoint invokes the co-located PowerShell script with framed colored retry output, clears the console before reruns, and resolves Windows PowerShell from the trusted absolute SystemRoot path instead of PATH.

Wrapper path and console formatting adapted after rehome so the published helper entrypoint invokes the co-located PowerShell script with framed colored retry output, clears the console before reruns, and resolves Windows PowerShell from the trusted absolute SystemRoot path instead of PATH.
Toolkit-adapted after migration to ignore stale node-ID credential bindings when both node name and node type differ.

Toolkit-adapted after migration to make project-local workflow hook autoload opt-in via N8N_WORKFLOW_HOOK_AUTOLOAD while preserving explicit N8N_WORKFLOW_HOOK_SCRIPT configuration, use separator-aware strict child-path checks so clearable run directories must resolve under .tmp on Windows and non-Windows PowerShell hosts, reject symlink, junction, and reparse-point run-directory components before recursive export staging cleanup, refuse unresolved or filesystem-root repo-root fallback so .tmp and .n8n-local state is not created under helper folders or drive roots, and provide colored section/status output with clean failure reporting.

Toolkit-adapted after migration to make project-local workflow hook autoload opt-in via N8N_WORKFLOW_HOOK_AUTOLOAD while preserving explicit N8N_WORKFLOW_HOOK_SCRIPT configuration. Also prevents dry-run hook execution, revalidates prepared workflow JSON after before-live-import hooks with explicit prepared-import validation before live import execution, clears prepared import staging per run, exits before before-live-import hooks when no payloads are planned, uses separator-aware strict child-path checks so clearable run directories must resolve under .tmp on Windows and non-Windows PowerShell hosts, rejects symlink, junction, and reparse-point run-directory components before recursive cleanup, refuses unresolved or filesystem-root repo-root fallback so .tmp and .n8n-local state is not created under helper folders or drive roots, and provides colored section/status output with clean failure reporting.

RestartContainerAfterImport menu guidance adapted to recommend the existing auto-restart option for local Docker imports when restart warnings appear. Repo-root resolution was added after rehome and hardened to refuse filesystem roots so .n8n-local command history is maintained only under a safe repo root instead of under helper folders or drive roots. Toolkit-adapted to resolve import, export, and validation helper commands from the co-located helper folder, canonicalize trusted replay paths, resolve Node explicitly, block old, malformed, or untrusted saved previous-command records, and provide colored section/status output.
Toolkit-adapted after migration to skip stale node-ID credential bindings when both node name and node type differ.
Toolkit-adapted after migration to keep machine-readable credential binding paths slash-normalized while displaying local console paths with native separators.

Toolkit-adapted after migration to make project-local validation-rule autoload opt-in via N8N_WORKFLOW_VALIDATION_RULES_AUTOLOAD while preserving explicit N8N_WORKFLOW_VALIDATION_RULES configuration. Also adds explicit prepared-import validation mode for live import payload revalidation while keeping default directory-name and committed-template hygiene enforcement strict.

Template source rehomed under error-handling, then toolkit-adapted to route alert outputs through escaped email fields, bounded subject fields, and formula-hardened sheet fields while preserving the generic global-error-handler template shape.
